- Resolution of the distance variation : 2 km

- Le Km Rec[p] = Km Rec[1] - somme des delta de 2 à p
- Resolution of the "Travel Distance " variation : 20 km
- Trigger : switch to state "regeneration failure" (0x50) and without partial regeneration
- Resolution of the "Travel Distance " variation : 4 km
- Trigger : switch to state "Speed request" (0x08) AND rising trig of PFlt_stSpReqDrvRec_mp

- Resolution of the "Simulated Soot Mass" variable : 1,6 g
